title: fix(deps): update module github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang to v0.11.0
body:

| [github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang](https://redirect.github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang) | `v0.10.0` -> `v0.11.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fseccomp%2flibseccomp-golang/v0.11.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fseccomp%2flibseccomp-golang/v0.11.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fseccomp%2flibseccomp-golang/v0.10.0/v0.11.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fseccomp%2flibseccomp-golang/v0.10.0/v0.11.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>seccomp/libseccomp-golang (github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang)</summary>

### [`v0.11.0`](https://redirect.github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang/releases/tag/v0.11.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Add new architectures (LOONGARCH64, M68K, SH, SHEB)
-   Add support for SCMP_FLTATR_CTL_WAITKILL (GetWaitKill, SetWaitKill)
-   Add support for filter precompute (Precompute)
-   Add support for transactions (Transaction{Start,Commit,Reject})
-   Add ExportBPFMem
-   Improve documentation for struct fields
-   Fix TestRuleAddAndLoad for ppc architecture
-   Fix TestRuleAddAndLoad to not use magic number
-   Remove unused get_\*\_version implementation
-   Test against latest libseccomp and Go versions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang/compare/v0.10.0...v0.11.0

</details>
